use_cases: Landing page hero sections with immersive 3D animated visuals
Product launch pages with abstract geometric branding
Portfolio or showcase sites requiring distinctive hero imagery
Tech/SaaS landing pages seeking modern, premium aesthetics
Interactive homepage entry points with mouse-responsive parallax
ai_summary: A self-contained hero component featuring an animated wireframe sphere with volumetric lighting, chromatic glow effects, and a panning grid background. The component includes mouse-follow parallax interactivity, continuous rotation animations, and soft bloom/vignette post-processing effects. Configurable via a CONFIG object for easy visual customization. Suitable for SaaS, dev-tools, and creative product landing pages seeking premium, immersive first impressions.
